THRESHOLD: the final supply shuttle to the outpost
GOAL: the question the whole shuttle seems built around
TONE_MOTIF: the hull creaks and the viewport holds her reflection over the void
G0A0_CHAR: the night navigator and his worn data slate
G0A1_CHAR: the long row of sealed cargo pods
G0A2_CHAR: the data chip a stranger left tucked in a seat
G0A3_CHAR: the drifting debris field beyond the viewport
G1A0_CHAR: the galley regulars who never seem to eat
G1A1_CHAR: the small child awake at the end of the corridor
G1A2_CHAR: the man softly counting beacons that never come
G1A3_CHAR: the woman in silver mourning her crew
G2A0_CHAR: the navigator hailed a second time near the corridor
G2A1_CHAR: the faint route etched into the data chip
G2A2_CHAR: the beacon lights burning ahead of the corridor mouth
G2A3_CHAR: the crew gathered to weigh the choice together
G3A0_CHAR: the navigator at last willing to explain the outpost route
G3A1_CHAR: the wakeful child offering to show the way through
G3A2_CHAR: the mourning woman's quiet request to carry a message on
G3A3_CHAR: the manifest whose columns of routes never end
R_PEACE_CHAR: the plain act of drifting on, wide awake
R_HELP_CHAR: the crewmate at the corridor end who needs a hand
R_TRUTH_CHAR: the last unread lines of the stranger's data chip
R_LEAVE_CHAR: the cold airlock door and the idea of stepping out
LEAVE_EARLY_PRIZE: Back at the First Launch Bay
